product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer has very low income and no capacity for savings products.

approachability.reasoning: The customer has very low income and explicitly stated he cannot afford savings plans after meeting basic living expenses. He is not a suitable prospect for this product.

profile.summary: The agent pitched an HDFC Life savings plan to a fruit vendor. The customer disclosed a monthly income of 10-14k INR and explained he has no capacity for savings after paying rent and living expenses. The agent continued to ask personal questions despite the customer's clear financial constraints.
